question: How many people are not playing in the image? Select from the following options: (A) None, everyone is playing. (B) Three, two spectators and a referee are present. (C) Two, a spectator and a referee are present. (D) One, a spectator is watching the game.
answer_choices: Three, two spectators and a referee are present
Two, a spectator and a referee are present
One, a spectator is watching the game

qwen_prompt_object.inpaint_prompt: Two spectators sitting on a bench, one holding a camera, watching the game.
qwen_prompt_object.negative_prompt: No spectators, no bench, no camera, no one watching the game.

inpaint_prompt_used: Two spectators sitting on a bench, one holding a camera, watching the game.
negative_prompt_used: No spectators, no bench, no camera, no one watching the game.
